create(uint32,bytes32,bytes).notice: Creates a new DisputeGame proxy contract.

findLatestGames(uint32,uint256,uint256).notice: Finds the `_n` most recent `GameId`'s of type `_gameType` starting at `_start`. If there are less than         `_n` games of type `_gameType` starting at `_start`, then the returned array will be shorter than `_n`.

gameAtIndex(uint256).notice: `gameAtIndex` returns the dispute game contract address and its creation timestamp          at the given index. Each created dispute game increments the underlying index.          Reverts if the provided index does not correspond to an existing dispute game.

gameCount().notice: The total number of dispute games created by this factory.

gameImpls(uint32).notice: `gameImpls` is a mapping that maps `GameType`s to their respective         `IDisputeGame` implementations.

DisputeGameCreated(address,uint32,bytes3.notice: Emitted when a new dispute game is created

ImplementationSet(address,uint32).notice: Emitted when a new game implementation added to the factory

InitBondUpdated(uint32,uint256).notice: Emitted when a game type's initialization bond is updated

GameAlreadyExists(bytes32).notice: Thrown when a dispute game that already exists is attempted to be created.

IncorrectBondAmount().notice: Thrown when a supplied bond is not equal to the required bond amount to cover the cost of the interaction.

NoImplementation(uint32).notice: Thrown when a dispute game is attempted to be created with an unsupported game type.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdmin().notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdminOrProxy.notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin owner or the ProxyAdmin.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdminOwner().notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin owner.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotResolvedDelegateP.notice: Thrown when the current contract is not a ResolvedDelegateProxy.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotSharedProxyAdminO.notice: Thrown when the ProxyAdmin owner of the current contract is not the same as the         ProxyAdmin owner of the other Proxy address provided.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_ProxyAdminNotFound().notice: Thrown when the ProxyAdmin owner of the current contract is not found.

ReinitializableBase_ZeroInitVersion().notice: Thrown when the initialization version is zero.

userdoc.notice: A factory contract for creating `IDisputeGame` contracts. All created dispute games are stored in both a         mapping and an append only array. The timestamp of the creation time of the dispute game is packed tightly         into the storage slot with the address of the dispute game to make offchain discoverability of playable         dispute games easier.

params._extraData: Any extra data that should be provided to the created dispute game.
params._gameType: The type of the DisputeGame - used to decide the proxy implementation.
params._rootClaim: The root claim of the DisputeGame.

returns.proxy_: The address of the created DisputeGame proxy.

params._gameType: The type of game to find.
params._n: The number of games to find.
params._start: The index to start the reverse search from.

params._index: The index of the dispute game.

returns.gameType_: The type of the DisputeGame - used to decide the proxy implementation.
returns.proxy_: The clone of the `DisputeGame` created with the given parameters.
returns.timestamp_: The timestamp of the creation of the dispute game.

returns.gameCount_: The total number of dispute games created by this factory.
